title: Greece poison centre information card
summary: Keep the product container, label, exposure time, route, amount if known, age, symptoms, and medicines ready for the call.
content: Keep the product container, label, exposure time, route, amount if known, age, symptoms, and medicines ready for the call. Contact 112 for severe symptoms and the Greek Poison Centre at 210 7793777 for specialist poisoning information. Do not induce vomiting or give a home remedy unless a qualified professional instructs it.
materials: Notebook or printed card. Context: “Greece poison centre information card”.
Pencil. Context: “Greece poison centre information card”.
Relevant labels, contacts, and official alerts — for «Greece poison centre information card»
steps: Keep the product container, label, exposure time, route, amount if known, age, symptoms, and medicines ready for the call.
Contact 112 for severe symptoms and the Greek Poison Centre at 210 7793777 for specialist poisoning information.
Assign one person to act and another to verify the result for Greece poison centre information card.

warnings: Do not induce vomiting or give a home remedy unless a qualified professional instructs it.

common_mistakes: Acting before location, time, hazard, and responsible person are clear for Greece poison centre information card.

alternatives: Use a paper note, SMS, radio message, or trusted messenger when the main system is unavailable for Greece poison centre information card.
failure_signs: The decision source, responsible person, or next review cannot be identified for Greece poison centre information card.

when_not_to_use: Do not use this card to override an evacuation order, emergency responder, clinician, product label, or local law for Greece poison centre information card.
short_term: For Greece poison centre information card, stabilize the immediate risk, communicate the decision, and schedule the next check before attention moves elsewhere.
long_term: After Greece poison centre information card, update supplies, contact lists, maps, training, and the written plan from what actually happened.
if_method_fails: Stop Greece poison centre information card, isolate the unsafe result, communicate the failure, and use the safest official or professionally supported fallback available.
environment_notes: Adapt Greece poison centre information card to Greek heat, wildfire smoke, earthquakes, islands, mountain roads, apartment stairs, power cuts, water interruptions, mobility limits, and official alerts.
